fields.name: Ferno
fields.subtitle: Wayfarers of Death
fields.description: Ferno are touched by death itself, bearing dark blueish skin and eyes as black as the void. They have an innate connection to the undying curse.
fields.appearance: Dark blueish skin, black eyes, black or pale white hair

special_abilities.name: Auto-detect Undying
special_abilities.description: Automatically detect undying stacks on visible creatures

special_abilities.name: Lower Undying Check DC
special_abilities.description: Lower undying check DC by 1

fields.name: Death Touched Ferno
fields.description: Can respawn in place on successful undying check via white ghostflame. Loses HP regeneration in darkness, instead takes HP damage in bright light.

special_abilities.name: Ghostflame Respawn
special_abilities.description: Can respawn in place on successful undying check via white ghostflame

fields.name: Skin Draped Ferno
fields.description: Can harvest skin from corpses for temporary bonuses. Half darkvision, Sanity becomes Precision, loses undying detection.

special_abilities.name: Harvest Skin Mats
special_abilities.description: Can harvest skin from corpses for bonuses (+1 FP, +2 HP, creature-specific bonus per mat). Max (1 + level/5) mats, expire after 1 day

fields.name: Grme
fields.subtitle: Masters of the Hollowed Earth
fields.description: Shorter and stockier than most lineages, the Grme are master craftsmen with innate physical resilience.

special_abilities.name: Craft Speed
special_abilities.description: Craft spells and equipment 2x faster

fields.name: Geode Grme
fields.description: Hard crystalline skin. Replaces tier resistance with flat physical and magic reduction.

fields.name: Diamond Grme
fields.description: Clear crystalline eyes. Replaces tier resistance with +1 tiers to ALL resistible damage types when at or below 50% HP.

special_abilities.name: All Resistance When Wounded
special_abilities.description: +1 tiers to ALL resistible damage types when ≤50% HP

fields.name: Darrow
fields.subtitle: Forsaken Dwellers
fields.description: Blind but possessing incredible hearing and smell, the Darrow navigate the world through senses beyond sight.
fields.appearance: Pale greenish skin, white pupil-less eyes, large tusk-like lower canines

vision.special: Pinpoint creatures via hearing/smell. Auto-fail sight perception, advantage on other perception. Immune to impaired vision; deafened also causes impaired vision

special_abilities.name: Sanity Scaling
special_abilities.description: +1 sanity every 5 levels. Can use sanity instead of athletics for resisting effects or perception checks

fields.name: Abyssal Darrow
fields.description: Darker skin with black pockmarks. Loses all sanity bonuses but gains perfect spatial perception of last creature with skin contact (lasts 10 hours).

special_abilities.name: Perfect Spatial Perception
special_abilities.description: Gain perfect spatial perception of last creature with skin contact (10 hours)

fields.name: Bleeding Eye Darrow
fields.description: Loses sanity bonuses. Can conjure invisible yellow flames that daze enemies.

special_abilities.name: Conjure Yellow Flames
special_abilities.description: Conjure invisible yellow flames (25 ft range, 1 FP, once/short rest +1 at level 15). Creatures moving into flame make DC 12 sanity check or become dazed. Flame lasts 1 round, extendable for 1 FP/round

fields.name: Corvian
fields.subtitle: Rooken Ones
fields.description: Bird-like beings with feathers and wings, the Corvian are agile and naturally attuned to Focus Point regeneration.
fields.appearance: Bird-like humans with feathers, beaks, tails, wings, tall and lanky

fields.name: Night Corvian
fields.description: Dark feathers with bone covering eyes. Full darkvision but only get FP regen at night or in darkness.

fields.name: Broad Wing Corvian
fields.description: Large wingspan allows gliding and negates fall damage, but lose half darkvision and jump bonuses.

fields.name: Locust-folk
fields.subtitle: Abyssal Scholars
fields.description: Frail bug-like beings with incredible knowledge-seeking abilities and unique survival traits.
fields.appearance: Short, frail, bug-like with insect features (wings, arms, legs, eyes, mandibles)

hp_modifier.special: Half max HP from starting backgrounds, only 1d4 + Vit mod HP per even level

special_abilities.name: Cannot Be One-Shot
special_abilities.description: Cannot be killed in one hit when at full HP (leaves at 1 HP instead)

special_abilities.name: Bonus Knowledge
special_abilities.description: 2 knowledge points per odd level (instead of 1)

special_abilities.name: Locust Drain
special_abilities.description: Heal for half damage dealt in one round

fields.name: Sand Wretch Locust Folk
fields.description: Yellowish coarse carapace. Loses the 1 HP survival ability.

special_abilities.name: Bonus Knowledge
special_abilities.description: 2 knowledge points per odd level (instead of 1)

special_abilities.name: Locust Drain
special_abilities.description: Heal for half damage dealt in one round

fields.name: Swarm Sentinel Locust Folk
fields.description: Hard brownish-yellow spiked carapace. +3 to lowest non-knowledge skill, add total knowledge to max HP. Locust Spines reflect damage.

special_abilities.name: Skill and HP Bonus
special_abilities.description: +3 to lowest non-knowledge skill, add total knowledge to max HP

special_abilities.name: Locust Spines
special_abilities.description: Reflect HP lost as true damage to melee attacker

fields.unlock_requirement: Sand Wretch Locust Folk level 15+ with Wretch Queen ritual

fields.name: Deep Earth Locust Folk
fields.description: Lose locust drain and bonus knowledge. Gain half darkvision and dark resistance that can heal when damage is fully negated.

special_abilities.name: Dark Damage Healing
special_abilities.description: When dark damage fully negated, heal that amount instead

fields.name: Dragonkind
fields.subtitle: Serpent Touched
fields.description: Scales and lizard-like features mark these descendants of dragons. Their appearance reflects their chosen elemental affinity.
fields.appearance: Scales, lizard faces, tails; appearance reflects dragon type (fire/frost/poison/magic/dark/lightning)

special_abilities.name: Choose Elemental Affinity
special_abilities.description: Choose ONE: 2 tiers fire resistance OR 2 tiers magic resistance OR 15 base poison/toxic threshold OR 15 base frost threshold OR 2 tiers dark/lightning resistance. Bonuses increase: +1 tier (or +5 threshold) at levels 10 and 20

special_abilities.name: FP Regen on Element Hit
special_abilities.description: Regen 1 FP when struck by chosen element/status in combat

fields.name: Serpentine Dragonkind
fields.description: Snake-like appearance. Lose innate bonuses. Can grow/shed scales for physical resistance or movement. Enhanced abilities when submerged/drenched.

special_abilities.name: Scale Shedding
special_abilities.description: Grow/shed scales for +1 tier physical resistance OR 1 AP free movement/turn. Both effects active when submerged/drenched (+2 tier physical, 2 AP movement at level 17)

scaling.effect: When submerged: +2 tier physical, 2 AP movement

special_abilities.name: Aquatic Movement
special_abilities.description: Move through water without penalty, hold breath 2x longer

fields.name: Ancient Scale Dragonkind
fields.description: Petrified scales and 4 elemental wings. Lose elemental resistances but gain knowledge, FP regeneration in combat, and Wing Shockwave ability.

special_abilities.name: Four Hard Wings
special_abilities.description: 4 hard wings (fire/frost/magic/dark/poison/lightning). Change wing type for 3 AP, once/short rest or at rest end

special_abilities.name: Wing Shockwave
special_abilities.description: Hits all adjacent spaces for 1d6 damage or 1d4 status buildup

fields.unlock_requirement: Regular Dragonkind level 10+ with communion of 3+ dragon types

fields.name: Demonkind
fields.subtitle: Progeny of Chaos
fields.description: Marked by horrible malformities from chaos, these beings possess fire-based abilities and fierce retaliation.
fields.appearance: Horrible malformities (spider appendages, lava holes, ashen skin with cinders)

special_abilities.name: Melee Retaliation
special_abilities.description: 1d6 fire damage to melee attacker

fields.name: Fire Beacon Demonkind
fields.description: Extreme fire affliction. Emit bright and dim light. Retaliation becomes a blinding effect instead of damage.

special_abilities.name: Emit Light
special_abilities.description: Emit 10 ft bright light + 10 ft dim light

special_abilities.name: Blinding Retaliation
special_abilities.description: Retaliation becomes DC (10 + Att mod) perception or inflict impaired vision for 1 round

fields.name: Black Horned Demonkind
fields.description: Lesser fire, greater bone/horn affliction. Retaliation deals physical damage and armor durability loss.

special_abilities.name: Durability Retaliation
special_abilities.description: Retaliation is physical damage + 1d2 armor durability loss

fields.name: Unchanged Human
fields.subtitle: Primordial Trueborn
fields.description: The most versatile lineage, unchanged humans have no fixed bonuses but can adapt to any role through flexible stat and skill choices.

special_abilities.name: Flexible Skills
special_abilities.description: +2 to any skill, -1 to any skill (player choice)

special_abilities.name: Flexible Stats
special_abilities.description: +1 to any stat at level 1 (again at level 17)

scaling.effect: +1 to any stat (can be different from level 1 choice)

special_abilities.name: Additional Skill Points
special_abilities.description: +1 to any skill at levels 5, 10, 20

fields.name: Vileblood
fields.subtitle: Blood of the Void
fields.description: Eerily pale beings with supernatural longevity and blood manipulation abilities.
fields.appearance: Eerily pale, sharp gaunt features, long clawed fingers, pointed ears, reddish eyes

special_abilities.name: Blood Mist Creation
special_abilities.description: Leave blood mist when taking physical damage or bleed buildup. Max (1 + level/10) mists active. Mists last 2 minutes

special_abilities.name: Blood Mist Teleport
special_abilities.description: Teleport to blood mist for 2 AP (once/turn)

special_abilities.name: Absorb Blood Mist
special_abilities.description: Absorb blood mist for 2 FP to heal 1d4 HP

fields.name: Outer Vileblood
fields.description: Dark nebulous spirals in eyes/spine/arms. Bleed threshold becomes frost. Dark damage/frost creates nebulous voids instead of blood mists.

special_abilities.name: Nebulous Void Creation
special_abilities.description: Dark damage or frost buildup creates nebulous voids. Max (1 + level/10) voids active. Voids last 2 minutes

special_abilities.name: Absorb Void for FP
special_abilities.description: Absorb void for 1d4 HP to regen 1d2 FP

special_abilities.name: Void Pull
special_abilities.description: Void pulls creature 1 space if fail DC (10 + Att) athletics, 2 AP, once/round

fields.name: Timeworn Vileblood
fields.description: Lose blood mist abilities (keep bleed threshold and sanity penalty). Half speed movement. Gain telepathy and short-range teleport.

movement.special: 2 AP per 5 ft movement (half speed), cannot speak normally

special_abilities.name: Telepathy
special_abilities.description: Telepathy (20 ft range)

special_abilities.name: Teleport
special_abilities.description: Teleport 2 spaces for 1 AP, Att stat times per short rest

fields.name: Elden
fields.subtitle: Children of the Deep
fields.description: Tall, thin beings from the deep with natural weapon proficiency and connection to abyssal forces.
fields.appearance: Tall, thin, pointed ears, pupil-less blue eyes, very dark skin, white/pale blue hair; tattoos/webbing/fins/kelp hair/barnacles

special_abilities.name: Weapon Proficiency Scaling
special_abilities.description: +1 weapon proficiency at levels 1, 9, 19, 28, 35

special_abilities.name: Auto-detect Abyssal
special_abilities.description: Auto-detect abyssal/deep sea influence (no check needed)

special_abilities.name: Free Destined Trait: Bloodthirsty
special_abilities.description: Automatically gain the Bloodthirsty destined trait

fields.name: Oceanic Elden
fields.description: Twisted oceanic features. Lose abyssal detection and Bloodthirsty trait. Gain aquatic abilities and weapon feat when submerged.

special_abilities.name: Weapon Proficiency Scaling
special_abilities.description: +1 weapon proficiency at levels 1, 9, 19, 28, 35

special_abilities.name: Aquatic Adaptation
special_abilities.description: Breathe in Deep Sea realm, hold breath 2x in water, move through water without penalty

special_abilities.name: Submerged Weapon Feat
special_abilities.description: Choose one level 5 weapon feat usable when submerged/drenched

fields.name: Spectral Elden
fields.description: Faded ghostlike features with ghost trails. Lose deep/abyssal detection and bonus proficiency. Gain bonus attunement slots and Fade ability.

special_abilities.name: Bonus Attunement Slots
special_abilities.description: Bonus attunement slot at levels 3, 7, 13, 19, 27

special_abilities.name: Fade
special_abilities.description: Become intangible/transparent for 2 FP until next turn (5 sec outside combat): immune to grapple/physical damage, pass through inorganic material (≤3 ft), +3 stealth

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel
fields.subtitle: Silveren Reborn
fields.description: Chrome silver beings with a unique life cycle system. Inherits traits from their prior lineage and can be reborn.
fields.appearance: Chrome silver substance in humanoid shape; can mimic human appearance; silver pupil-less eyes, silver hair, silver blood

special_abilities.name: Life Stage System
special_abilities.description: Abilities change based on life stage: Early (0-3 months): +2 random knowledge, quarter darkvision (15 ft). Middle (4-8 months): Athletics +1, Acrobatics +1, half darkvision (30 ft). Late (9-12 months): Sanity +1, free dodge once/long rest, full darkvision (60 ft)

life_stages.early: 0-3 months: +2 random knowledge, quarter darkvision (15 ft)
life_stages.middle: 4-8 months: Athletics +1, Acrobatics +1, half darkvision (30 ft)
life_stages.late: 9-12 months: Sanity +1, free dodge once/long rest, full darkvision (60 ft)

special_abilities.name: Armor Durability Vulnerability
special_abilities.description: Take 10 true damage per armor durability damage point (even unarmored)

special_abilities.name: Exhaustion Immunity
special_abilities.description: Immune to exhaustion from sleep/food

special_abilities.name: Rebirth Mechanic
special_abilities.description: Can reduce undying stacks by 1 and keep skill bonuses from previous life cycles

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Ferno)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Ferno. Inherits Sanity +1 and auto-detect undying stacks.

special_abilities.name: Auto-detect Undying
special_abilities.description: Automatically detect undying stacks on visible creatures

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Grme)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Grme. Inherits Precision +1 and craft 2x faster.

special_abilities.name: Craft Speed
special_abilities.description: Craft spells and equipment 2x faster

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Darrow)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Darrow. Can pinpoint creatures 15 ft via hearing/smell. Darkvision capped at 15 ft.

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Corvian)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Corvian. Inherits Acrobatics +1 and 1 FP regen/hour.

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Locust-Folk)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Locust-Folk. Knowledge not random, +2 random knowledge in mid/late life. 1d4 HP die.

special_abilities.name: Knowledge Bonus
special_abilities.description: Knowledge not random, +2 random knowledge in mid/late life

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Dragonkind)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Dragonkind. 1 tier magic OR fire resistance, OR +3 poison OR frost threshold.

special_abilities.name: Choose Elemental Affinity
special_abilities.description: Choose ONE: 1 tier fire resistance OR 1 tier magic resistance OR +3 poison threshold OR +3 frost threshold

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Demonkind)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Demonkind. Fire Keeping +1, Demonkind retaliation once/short rest (1d6 magic damage).

special_abilities.name: Melee Retaliation
special_abilities.description: 1d6 magic damage to melee attacker

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Unchanged Human)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Unchanged Human. +1 to a stat.

special_abilities.name: Flexible Stat
special_abilities.description: +1 to any stat (player choice)

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Vileblood)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Vileblood. Sanity -1, 13 base bleed threshold, can extend life stages 2x duration.

special_abilities.name: Extend Life Stages
special_abilities.description: Can extend life stages 2x duration

fields.name: Mercurous Vessel (Elden)
fields.description: Prior lineage: Elden. Athletics -1, -1 starting HP, +1 weapon proficiency at levels 5, 13, 23.

special_abilities.name: Weapon Proficiency Scaling
special_abilities.description: +1 weapon proficiency at levels 5, 13, 23
